title: Gangsta.
sourceNotes: S1 anime (12 eps, 2015) adapts roughly manga ch 1-28 (through about vol 5); the finale (ep 12) covers ch 26-28, so a viewer resumes reading at ch 29 (vol 6). Paired with Kohske's manga, which is on a long hiatus due to the author's health: the latest published chapter is 56 (Dec 2020) across 8 volumes; AniList does not track a chapter count for this series. Serialization is announced to resume with ch 57 in July 2026. Internal episode/chapter splits are approximate; the Gangsta:Cursed. spin-off and the 'Postman' one-shot are excluded.

mappings.arc: Ergastulum & the Handymen (Worick, Nicolas & Alex; Twilight underworld intro)
Worick & Nicolas' Past (Twilight law, the Corsica family & the four families)
The Guild & the Twilight Hunt (anime finale)
The Twilight Massacre & Aftermath (unadapted tail; latest ch 56, on hiatus)
